# Comp Set: [Component Name]

**Screen Name**: [app screen this represents, e.g., "Home", "Settings"]
**Nav Selectors**: [CSS selectors for buttons that route here, or "unassigned"]
**Status**: active | approved
**Created**: YYYY-MM-DD
**Parent**: [parent exploration ID, if expansion] | none
**Source Comp**: [comp ID that was expanded, if expansion] | none
**Depth**: 0 | 1 | 2
**Palettes**: [list of palette IDs available for this exploration]
**Related Feature**: [link to design doc or exploration report, if applicable]

## Component Description

> What this component is and what it does.

## Design Requirements

> Specific requirements driving the design. Pulled from exploration report or design document.

## Experience Location

> Where in the application this component will live. What surrounds it. What context does the user have when they encounter it.

> Track changes made during review. Newest entries at the top.

## Sign-Off Notes

> Final notes when the comp set is approved. Which comp(s) were selected and why. Any modifications to carry into implementation.
